items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where the persona books an appointment while driving. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or outcomes related to the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the system supports such functionality. As a result, the validation cannot be completed due to a lack of concrete evidence.
